creator: kiri@pis.toba-cmt.ac.jp
text:
Updated mew ports from 1.92.4 to 1.93. 

Update files are respecively :
[Add] :
mail/mew-emacs20, mail/mew-xemacs-mule, mail/mew-xemacs20
[Delete] :
japanese/mew-mule, japanese/mew-xemacs
[Update] :
mail/mew, mail/mew-common, mail/mew-mule, mail/mew-xemacs

Added new ports(mail/mew-emacs20, mail/mew-xemacs-mule,
mail/mew-xemacs20) were packed with tar+gz to "mew-1.93-981010.tar.gz".
Delete and updated ports have diffed to "mew-1.93-981010.diff". And
both files were packed with tar+gz+uuencode to
mew-1.93-ports.tar.gz.uu and put below ">Fix".
